text: Nations agree to release oil reserves as war in Iran hits global economy - The Washington Post

text: Ignore the romance, and Reminders Of Him actually has something to say about motherhood - AV Club
fullText: Romance may get you in the door to Reminders Of Him, the latest Colleen Hoover film, but it's the questions of motherhood that will linger.

text: No Nobles Day: Britain's Parliament boots its last hereditary Lords after 700 years - NPR
fullText: Government minister Nick Thomas-Symonds said the change put an end to "an archaic and undemocratic principle." The removed aristocrats are 92 of the House of Lords' 800 members.

text: Dresden city centre to be evacuated after WW2 bomb found - BBC
fullText: The city's biggest ever evacuation comes after the British flying bomb was discovered near a collapsed bridge.

text: Colts, Daniel Jones do a two-year deal - NBC Sports

text: Dozens of U.S. service members in Kuwait suffered serious injuries, including burns, brain trauma and shrapnel wounds, sources say - CBS News
